title: Prime Spot
content:
!-/gallery /pbox_images/photo-20050109-14 1901-0.jpg!
!-/gallery /pbox_images/photo-20050109-14 1901-1.jpg!

I saw this "big slogan" sitting on the stairs in front of Siam Center. It's TRT's new slogan. No No .. I didn't say that anything's wrong. I just don't like this party (and its leader) -- that's all. :)

Oh did I mention this one is a new slogan (or should I say **promotional catch phrase**)? The old one was "4 ปีซ่อม 4 ปีสร้าง" but since Democrat got number 4 for the election and TRT got 9. "4" doesn't seem to work anymore. ;)

Addition (thanks to no-i): I didn't pay much attention to the photos so I didn't notice that the slogan is unreadable. The new TRT's slogan is "โอกาส คือ อนาคต". I'm going to keep my comments/criticism away since this is a pbox_images. But readers, please feel free to speak. I love opinions. :)
<!--more-->
